overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment at night, featuring red neon lights filtering through window blinds. The camera moves slowly through the room, revealing modern industrial interior details and the city glow outside, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077 game footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with neon city view

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through the dimly lit apartment, approaching the window with horizontal blinds

entered.detail: rumpled bed with disheveled sheets in the foreground
red neon signage visible through window with cyberpunk aesthetic
large window covered with horizontal slatted blinds filtering exterior light
low wooden cabinet or nightstand against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark cyberpunk apartment bedroom with an unmade bed in the foreground. Red neon light from a 'No Future' sign glows through the left window, while horizontal blinds cover a large central window. The camera moves steadily forward toward the window, revealing a small wooden cabinet on the right side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment interior near window with city lights

events.description: camera moves past the bed, shifting focus to the window blinds and right side furniture

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk toward the window, passing the bed and approaching the blinds and cabinet

entered.detail: electronic device with illuminated display sitting atop the wooden cabinet

segments.scene_description: Having moved past the bed, the camera approaches the window with horizontal blinds, which now dominate the center of the frame. The small wooden cabinet on the right comes into closer view, revealing a digital alarm clock with a glowing display on top. The red neon sign fades to the far left as the camera focuses on the window and the city lights filtering through the blinds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark cyberpunk bedroom that shifts from a wide view of the interior toward a focused gaze at the city lights outside. It begins beside an unmade bed, with a red neon No Future sign casting a glow through the left window while horizontal blinds obscure the central view. As the camera glides forward, the red neon light recedes to the far left and a small wooden cabinet on the right enters the frame. The scene then narrows its focus as the camera approaches the window, revealing a glowing digital alarm clock atop the cabinet before the horizontal blinds and the filtering city lights come to dominate the center of the frame.
